text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Thanks to you, I was able to get
some much-needed rest!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
After a dip in the boilin' hot bath, I knocked back
a tall, frosty glass of fruity milk! Aaand...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's a paradiiise! ♪ Paradiiise! ♪ Oasis of the
shopping district! ♪ ...Kinda thing.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Man, that bathhouse was just as advertised. You
gotta come with me next time, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
